fields.Name: GW03 - Navigate References Section
fields.Description: Clicks the top-nav References menu and lands on the references landing page. Demonstrates pure nav-flow testing (no search, no auth) plus the custom 'final-url-host' oracle from the example oracle module.

InputDefinition.goal: Find and click the 'References' link in the top navigation. The page that loads should be the MDN References landing page — listing topics like Web APIs, JavaScript, HTML, CSS. Do not drill into a specific reference; verify the landing page appeared.

judgeValidationCriteria: Landed on a references / docs landing page
Did not drill into a specific reference
